calendar.matters:
Writ Of Prohibition
Off Calendar Feb-28-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Steven M. Berliner, Esq. 310/981-2002 & Donna M. Williamson, Esq. 673-7114 for petitioner & moving party Bay Area Air Quality Management District; Robert J. Bezemek, Esq. 510/763-5690 for respondent & opposing party Bay Area Air Quality Management District Employees' Association; Robert G. Thompson, Esq. 916/327-8381 for respondent Public Employment Relations Board.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Writ of prohibition treated as a plea in abatement and granted staying administrative action as to all matters in prior filed legal action 310305. PERB has jurisdiction over violation arising prior to July 1, 2001.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner to prepare order.

Writ Of Prohibition
Off Calendar Feb-14-2002 Continued To Feb-28-02 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: CONTINUED TO 2/28 AT 3:30PM. (CW)
